name: Arjun Mehta
title: CEO & Co-Founder
bio: Former Head of Revenue Operations at Salesforce APAC. Built ArcAgent to solve the scaling problem he lived through firsthand. Obsessed with the intersection of enterprise AI and operational efficiency.

name: Vikram Nair
title: CTO & Co-Founder
bio: Former Staff Engineer at Google Brain. Deep expertise in multi-agent systems, LLM fine-tuning, and production AI infrastructure. Led the architecture of ArcAgent's orchestration layer from day one.

name: Kavya Reddy
title: Head of Product
bio: Previously VP Product at Freshworks. Brought the product discipline that turned ArcAgent's technical capabilities into an experience enterprise buyers actually love. Champion of the 14-day deployment model.

name: Marcus Webb
title: VP Sales
bio: 20 years in enterprise software sales across Oracle, SAP, and HubSpot. Joined ArcAgent to sell the product he wished he'd had for the first 18 years of his career.

name: Deepa Krishnan
title: Head of Customer Intelligence
bio: Former Data Science Lead at Gainsight. Designed ArcPulse's churn prediction model and the health scoring framework used by 200+ enterprise clients. Believes retention is a data problem, not a people problem.

name: Sarah Chen
title: Head of Partnerships
bio: Built the global SI and technology partnership network from scratch. Responsible for ArcAgent's integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot, Zendesk, and 40+ other enterprise platforms.
